items.title: QURE Shareholder Alert: uniQure N.V. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join — The Gross Law Firm
items.description: The Gross Law Firm has filed a securities class action lawsuit against uniQure N.V. on behalf of shareholders who purchased shares between September 24, 2025 and October 31, 2025. The complaint alleges that the company issued materially false and misleading statements regarding FDA approval of its Pivotal Study design and downplayed the likelihood of delays to its Biologics License Application timeline. The deadline for lead plaintiff registration is April 13, 2026.

insights.reasoning: The company is facing a securities class action lawsuit alleging material misstatements and omissions regarding FDA approval of its clinical study design and BLA timeline delays, which resulted in artificial inflation of stock price and investor losses.

items.title: Black Rock Coffee Bar Expands Footprint in Oregon with New Beaverton Location
items.description: Black Rock Coffee Bar, an Oregon-based boutique coffee chain, opened its 35th location in Oregon at 3340 SW Cedar Hills Blvd in Beaverton on March 31, 2026. The expansion reflects the company's continued growth strategy in its home state, where it operates over 180 retail locations across seven states.

insights.reasoning: The company is actively expanding its footprint with a new location representing its 35th store in Oregon. The opening demonstrates continued growth momentum, strong brand presence in its home market, and commitment to community expansion. The article highlights popular products and customer loyalty programs, indicating healthy business operations.

items.title: LU Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action in Lufax Holding Ltd Securities Lawsuit — The Gross Law Firm
items.description: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Lufax Holding Ltd (NYSE: LU) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. The complaint alleges that Lufax issued materially false and misleading statements, lacked adequate internal controls, and had materially misstated financial results during the class period from April 7, 2023 to January 26, 2025. Shareholders who purchased shares during this period are encouraged to register by the May 20, 2026 deadline to potentially seek lead plaintiff status.

insights.reasoning: The company is the subject of a securities class action lawsuit alleging material misstatements, inadequate internal controls, and false/misleading statements about business operations and financial results, which directly harmed shareholders.

items.title: TCPC Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action in BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. Securities Lawsuit — The Gross Law Firm
items.description: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. The complaint alleges that the company issued materially false and misleading statements regarding investment valuations, portfolio restructuring effectiveness, and net asset value calculations during the period from November 6, 2024 to January 23, 2026. Shareholders who purchased shares during this period are encouraged to register by the April 6, 2026 deadline to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

insights.reasoning: The company is the subject of a securities class action lawsuit alleging material misstatements regarding investment valuations, portfolio quality, and net asset value overstatement, indicating significant corporate governance and disclosure failures that resulted in shareholder losses.

items.title: Convocation aux assemblées générales ordinaire et extraordinaire et publication du rapport annuel 2025
items.description: Umicore announced its 2025 annual report and convened shareholder meetings for April 30, 2026. The company reported strong sustainability progress, including a 31% reduction in scope 1 and 2 emissions and achievement of 60% renewable electricity sourcing. Board changes include the nomination of Anna Bertona and Benjamin Loh as independent members, while Frédéric Oudéa will continue as an independent director. A revised 2026 remuneration policy will be submitted for shareholder approval.

insights.reasoning: The company demonstrated strong sustainability performance with 31% reduction in emissions, achievement of renewable energy targets, improved safety metrics (54.6% TRIR reduction), and progress on diversity goals. The strategic board restructuring with experienced independent directors and updated governance frameworks indicate proactive management and commitment to long-term value creation.
